description: Free open-source Cambridge 9618 pseudocode interpreter and compiler (C11): run .pseudo programs offline, interactive REPL, static check for CI, math/random/time builtins, pkg optional packages, VS Code workflow, and a full manual with tutorial — for AS & A Level Computer Science.

author: Mahesh Ravariya
